title: More Weapons by katin
description: Weapons mod, guns rifles RPG and more. start suggesting more weapons in our discord server ;)
body:
added new weapons to minecraft, can be found in the "More Weapons" creative tab, in an armory (structure), at a crime scene (structure) or traded with a dealer (villager + obsidian)

adds many weapons and 2 structures to the game aswell as a new villager proffesion currently available when combining a villager and obsidian

Features: guns, new kind of weapons... idk what to tell you

a fun new way to harm villagers and players!

Upcoming updates: Explosive Update PT.2: Bombs, C4, Landmines (Maybe not 😔 ), CUSTOM BOMBS.
[add your ideas in our discord (DOESN'T EXPIRE ANYMORE)]
